name: m_conversation_repeat_stated_business_type
notes: Core context-retention closer: the owner VOLUNTARILY repeats a fact they already gave (out of not being sure it registered) — this must be treated as reassurance, not fresh info requiring a question, and no later turn may re-ask what's already known. Distinct from repeat_question_guard.json (which is a journey-walker multi-field capture test) — this is plain-chat (no --journey), the repeat is owner-initiated rather than a scripted re-ask probe. Setup: `setup --onboarded --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> m_conversation_repeat_stated_business_type.json`.
